apiKey.title: WhoisXML API Key
apiKey.description: Your WhoisXML Brand Alert API key. Get one at https://brand-alert.whoisxmlapi.com/api

brandKeywords.title: Brand Keywords
brandKeywords.description: List of keywords to monitor. Domains containing any of these terms will be flagged.

lookbackDays.title: Lookback Days
lookbackDays.description: Number of days back to check for newly-registered domains (1–14).

withTypos.title: Include Typo Variants
withTypos.description: When enabled, the WhoisXML API also returns domains with common typos of your keywords (e.g. acne → acme).
